ddls:
CREATE TABLE "imaging_modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the imaging modality (e.g., CT scan, MRI scan, X-ray) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging modality */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the imaging modality */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the imaging modality */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the imaging modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_parts" (
  "body_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body part */,
  "body_part_name" TEXT /* Name of the body part (e.g., Abdomen, Breast, Chest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body part */,
  "anatomical_system" TEXT /* Anatomical system that the body part belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging modality */,
  "body_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the body part */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the imaging modality for the body part */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the imaging modality for the body part */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the imaging modality for the body part */,
  "data_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data set used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_body_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_part_id") REFERENCES body_parts ("body_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES imaging_modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "imaging_modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging modality used */,
  "body_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the body part diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis result (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_results_imaging_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_modality_id") REFERENCES imaging_modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_results_body_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_part_id") REFERENCES body_parts ("body_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical professional */,
  "professional_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the medical professional (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "hospital" TEXT /* Hospital where the medical professional works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the medical professional works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the researcher works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the data analyst */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the data analyst works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the data analyst works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File name of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user importing the data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File name of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., precision, recall, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
